interpretation: bracketed-interpolation density at this level is the signature of the Saheeh International published translation; examples[].en is a verbatim external translation, NOT Qamus-authored
remediation_options: A) confirm Saheeh International redistribution rights for da'wah + add explicit attribution + license notice to the dataset/repo
B) replace examples[].en with an openly-licensed translation (CC0/CC-BY) — see the open-gloss deep-research
C) author original Qamus example renderings (large effort)
D) drop examples[].en from the PUBLIC dataset, keep examples[].ar + ref only (Arabic is Tanzil CC BY 3.0, already attributed)

And we used to enter into vain discourse with those who engaged [in it],
Who are in [empty] discourse amusing themselves.
Muhammad is the Messenger of Allah; and those with him are forceful against the disbelievers, merciful among themselves. You see them bowing and prostrating [in
That Day, the people will depart separated [into categories] to be shown [the result of] their deeds.
